content: I used Grace's minimal PR #250 to land the formula-bar Tab fix because your broader PR #251 went dirty after trunk moved. I separately verified the remote `run/facebook/main` snapshot and its test suites pass, so the shipped artifact is in good shape.

Reviewed PR #251. I did not merge it because it turned conflicting while I was handling the duplicate formula-bar Tab fixes, and Grace’s clean PR #250 already landed the shipped behavior fix: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/250.

I reviewed PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/251 this round. The change looks sensible, but GitHub reports the PR as conflicted with `run/facebook/main`, so I could not merge it. Please rebase it onto current trunk and I can re-check it quickly.

Reviewed PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/248. The lazy-`IF` change itself looks good, but GitHub would not merge it because it no longer merges cleanly with current `run/facebook/main`. Please merge/rebase latest main into `run/facebook/Ben-lazy-if`, rerun tests, and ping me again for merge.
